# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 1.x     | :white_check_mark: |
| < 1.0   | :x:                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

We take security issues seriously. If you discover a security vulnerability in this project, please **do not** open a public GitHub issue.

Instead, please report it privately by emailing **mrcorpt100010010@outlook.com** with the following information:

- Description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce (if applicable)
- Potential impact
- Your contact information

### What to expect:
- We will acknowledge receipt of your report within 48 hours
- We will investigate and determine the severity
- We will work on a fix and coordinate a disclosure timeline
- We will credit you in the security advisory (if desired)

## Security Best Practices

When using this project:
- Keep dependencies up to date
- Review security advisories regularly
- Report any suspicious activity

Thank you for helping keep this project secure!
